headline: Nanoscope Therapeutics Selects InspiroGene by McKesson to Support Distribution of Novel Retinal Therapy
summary: Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing novel, disease‑agnostic therapies for patients with photoreceptor loss and vision impairment due to retinal degeneration, today announced that it has selected InspiroGene by McKesson to provide U.S. commercialization services for its lead product, MOGENRY™, subject to U.S. regulatory approval.
